REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 63380508) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO GUESS, JAN WATERS II, ALBERT HENNESSY, VICKY SCOTT, WILLIAM

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, JAN GUESS, ALBERT WATERS, VICKY HENNESSY, WILLIAM SCOTT, AND LASHAWNA BROWN'S MOTION TO FILE RECORDS UNDER SEAL. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULES 2.550 AND 2.551. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE EXISTS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST THAT OVERCOMES THE RIGHT OF PUBLIC ACCESS TO THE PORTIONS OF THE RECORDS TO BE SEALED; THE OVERRIDING INTEREST SUPPORTS SEALING THOSE RECORDS; A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY EXISTS THAT THE OVERRIDING INTEREST WILL BE PREJUDICED IF THE RECORD IS NOT SEALED; THE PROPOSED SEALING IS NARROWLY TAILORED; AND NO LESS RESTRICTIVE MEANS EXIST TO ACHIEVE THE OVERRIDING INTEREST. *COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH COMPLIES WITH CRC 2.550, LISTING EACH DOCUMENT TO BE SEALED WITH THEIR TITLE, TRANSACTION NUMBER, AND DATE FILED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Records Under Seal
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, JAN GUESS, ALBERT WATERS, VICKY HENNESSY, WILLIAM SCOTT, and LASHAWNA BROWN's Motion To File Records Under Seal.

Grant. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Counsel for Defendant to prepare a proposed order which complies with CRC 2.550, listing each document to be sealed with their title, transaction number, and date filed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
